name: Shandong Shengli Co., Ltd.
summary: Shandong Shengli Co., Ltd. engages in the agro-chemical, plastic pipe, natural gas and oil products, and other industrial investment businesses in China. The company engages in the investment, construction, operation, and management of natural gas pipelines and natural gas urban pipeline networks; and transmission and distribution of liquefied natural gas (LNG) and compressed natural gas (CNG). It also researches and develops, produces, and sells herbicides, fungicides, and pesticides; and provides polyethylene pipes for use in urban gas transmission and distribution, water supply and drainage, environmental protection, chemical industry, etc. The company operates approximately 60 CNG filling stations, 20 LNG filling stations, 3 CNG mother stations, and an LNG liquefaction plant. Shandong Shengli Co., Ltd. was founded in 1994 and is based in Jinan, China.
